__fixture__.name: scheduled_maintenance_export_before
__fixture__.scenario: Future planned maintenance for hosted review publish and merge queue. Local editing, save, search, Git, diagnostics, and export remain available before the window; users with pending review drafts are required to export before maintenance starts.

title: Hosted review maintenance scheduled
summary: Hosted review publish and merge queue writes will pause during the scheduled window; local editing and local Git remain available.

affected_scope.scope_summary: Hosted review publish and merge queue writes for the pinned enterprise review scope.

control_plane.note: Review publish admission pauses during the scheduled maintenance window.
Merge queue enqueue pauses during the scheduled maintenance window.

data_plane.note: Local buffers and local save are unaffected.
Hosted review drafts can be prepared locally but not published during the window.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: continue local edits, save files, search, run local Git, and export review packets before the window
blocked_managed_only_capabilities: publish hosted review comments during the window
enqueue merge queue entries during the window
local_continuity.continuity_summary: The scheduled service window does not block local-first work.

blocked_write_classes.note: Export pending review drafts before the freeze deadline if they must survive the window.
Queue intent can be captured locally and retried after the maintenance window.

guidance_actions.message: Continue local editing, local Git, search, diagnostics, and export.
Export pending review drafts before the maintenance freeze if they cannot wait.
Capture merge queue intent locally and publish after the window.

boundary_change_summary.summary: No tenant, region, residency, key ownership, or endpoint identity change is planned for this maintenance.

display_copy.primary_status_line: Hosted review maintenance starts May 4, 2026 at 01:00 America/Los_Angeles.
display_copy.local_continuity_line: Local edits, save, search, Git, diagnostics, and export remain available.
display_copy.blocked_writes_line: Review publish and merge queue writes pause during the window.
